<path>/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenamegpt-oss-20b-mediumboundary_9354a4ebraw1561831762/001/boundary/internal/census/census_job.go</path>

<content>
1: // Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.
2: // SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1
3: 
4: package census
5: 
6: import (
7: 	"context"
8: 	"time"
9: 
10: 	"github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/db"
11: 	"github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/errors"
12: 	"github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/scheduler"
13: )
14: 
15: var (
16: 	NewCensusJobFn = newCensusJob
17: 	RunFn          = runInternal
18: )
19: 
20: type censusJob struct {
21: 	r                db.Reader
22: 	w                db.Writer
23: 	lurEnabled       bool
24: 	emitEvents       bool
25: 	sessionsAgent    any
26: 	activeUsersAgent any
27: 	eventCtx         context.Context
28: }
29: 
30: func newCensusJob(ctx context.Context, lurEnabled bool, r db.Reader, w db.Writer) (*censusJob, error) {
31: 	const op = "censusJob.newCensusJob"
32: 	switch {
33: 	case r == nil:
34: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing db.Reader")
35: 	case w == nil:
36: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing db.Writer")
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	return &censusJob{
40: 		r:                r,
41: 		w:                w,
42: 		lurEnabled:       lurEnabled,
43: 		emitEvents:       false,
44: 		sessionsAgent:    nil,
45: 		activeUsersAgent: nil,
46: 		eventCtx:         ctx,
47: 	}, nil
48: }
49: 
50: // Status reports the job’s current status.
51: func (c *censusJob) Status() scheduler.JobStatus {
52: 	return scheduler.JobStatus{}
53: }
54: 
55: // Run performs the required work depending on the implementation.
56: // The context is used to notify the job that it should exit early.
57: func (c *censusJob) Run(ctx context.Context) error {
58: 	err := RunFn(ctx, c)
59: 	return err
60: }
61: 
62: func runInternal(ctx context.Context, c *censusJob) error {
63: 	return nil
64: }
65: 
66: // NextRunIn returns the duration until the next job run should be scheduled.
67: // Census will run every hour to ensure any interrupted jobs will be re-attempted
68: func (c *censusJob) NextRunIn(_ context.Context) (time.Duration, error) {
69: 	return time.Hour, nil
70: }
71: 
72: // Name is the unique name of the job.
73: func (c *censusJob) Name() string {
74: 	return "job_run_census"
75: }
76: 
77: // Description is the human-readable description of the job.
78: func (c *censusJob) Description() string {
79: 	return "Gathers and exports session usage metrics"
